summary: Comprehensive testing of EzParts v3.0 Heavy Machinery & Diesel Parts completed successfully. All requested features are working perfectly. Backend APIs show 100% success rate (11/11 tests passed), frontend completely functional with golden phoenix logo, heavy machinery rebranding, My Fleet management, price comparison, OEM/Aftermarket filters, AI Chat with golden branding, and heavy equipment suppliers.
passed_tests: Homepage displays golden phoenix logo with 'THE NEW ERA' tagline correctly
Heavy machinery branding - CAT, Komatsu, Case, Cummins brands prominently displayed
Parts page shows 12 heavy equipment parts (hydraulic pumps, undercarriage, engines, etc.)
OEM/Aftermarket filters work perfectly (10 OEM parts, 2 Aftermarket parts)
Part detail modal opens with comprehensive price comparison across suppliers
Price comparison shows multiple supplier prices with shipping and trust scores
My Fleet page successfully rebranded from 'My Garage' to 'MY FLEET'
Add equipment functionality works - can add excavators, dozers, loaders with engine specs
Equipment management includes make/model/type/hours tracking for heavy machinery
AI Chat opens with golden branding 'EZPARTS AI' and 'Heavy Equipment Expert' subtitle
AI Chat has 4 heavy equipment quick questions (CAT 320, Komatsu, Cummins, Case)
AI Chat responds intelligently to heavy equipment questions about hydraulic pumps
Suppliers page shows 6 heavy equipment dealers with specialties and trust scores
Heavy equipment dealers include Caterpillar, Komatsu, Case, Cummins specialists
Navigation between all pages (Home, Parts, My Fleet, Suppliers, Saved) works smoothly
Backend API: All 11 endpoints working perfectly (100% success rate)
Backend API: Heavy machinery search and filtering operational
Backend API: Equipment/Fleet CRUD operations working
Backend API: AI Chat integration with heavy equipment context functional
Backend API: Price comparison across heavy equipment suppliers working
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (11/11 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (20/20 major features working perfectly)
